There is nothing like the mindblowing feeling you get once you watch this movie from start to finish for the first time.

Action aside, there will be some who will liken this to the Wachowski Brothers' Matrix, given its similarities in combining science fiction with philosophical existentialism issues, with cutting-edge action seemingly beyond its time.
